option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- Full-card book item for the Favourites vertical list --> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:background="@drawable/bg_book_list_card" android:padding="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
<!-- Book cover 96 × 144 dp --> <com.google.android.material.imageview.ShapeableImageView android:id="@+id/iv_cover" android:layout_width="96dp" android:layout_height="144dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:contentDescription="@null" app:shapeAppearanceOverlay="@style/BookCoverShape" />
<!-- Right content --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:paddingTop="2dp">
<!-- Row 1: Title + favourite heart (tappable to unfavourite) --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_title" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:maxLines="2" android:ellipsize="end" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.15" />
<!-- Tappable heart — touch target 40×40dp, icon 22×22dp --> <FrameLayout android:id="@+id/btn_unfav" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:contentDescription="Remove from Favourites">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/iv_fav_star" android:layout_width="22dp" android:layout_height="22dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:src="@drawable/ic_heart_filled" android:contentDescription="@null" />
</FrameLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Row 2: Author --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_author" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:textColor="@color/text_hint" android:textSize="13sp" />
<!-- Spacer — pushes rating + category to bottom --> <View android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" />
<!-- Row 3: 5 stars + numeric rating --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginTop="8dp">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/star_1" android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_filled" android:layout_marginEnd="1dp" android:contentDescription="@null" /> <ImageView android:id="@+id/star_2" android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_filled" android:layout_marginEnd="1dp" android:contentDescription="@null" /> <ImageView android:id="@+id/star_3" android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_filled" android:layout_marginEnd="1dp" android:contentDescription="@null" /> <ImageView android:id="@+id/star_4" android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_filled" android:layout_marginEnd="1dp" android:contentDescription="@null" /> <ImageView android:id="@+id/star_5" android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_filled" android:contentDescription="@null" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_rating" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Row 4: Category badge --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_category" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingEnd="8dp" android:paddingTop="3dp" android:paddingBottom="3dp" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textAllCaps="true" android:letterSpacing="0.06" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:background="@drawable/bg_category_tag" />
</LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- Full-card book item for the Favourites vertical list --> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:background="@drawable/bg_book_list_card" android:padding="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
<!-- Book cover 96 × 144 dp --> <com.google.android.material.imageview.ShapeableImageView android:id="@+id/iv_cover" android:layout_width="96dp" android:layout_height="144dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:contentDescription="@null" app:shapeAppearanceOverlay="@style/BookCoverShape" />
<!-- Right content --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:paddingTop="2dp">
<!-- Row 1: Title + Edit button + Unfavourite heart --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_title" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:maxLines="2" android:ellipsize="end" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.15" />
<!-- Edit button --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/btn_edit" android:layout_width="32dp" android:layout_height="32dp" android:padding="6dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_edit" android:contentDescription="Edit book" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:tint="@color/text_hint" />
<!-- Tappable heart — touch target 40×40dp, icon 22×22dp --> <FrameLayout android:id="@+id/btn_unfav" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:layout_marginStart="2dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:contentDescription="Remove from Favourites">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/iv_fav_star" android:layout_width="22dp" android:layout_height="22dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:src="@drawable/ic_heart_filled" android:contentDescription="@null" />
</FrameLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Row 2: Author --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_author" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:textColor="@color/text_hint" android:textSize="13sp" />
<!-- Spacer — pushes rating + category to bottom --> <View android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" />
<!-- Row 3: 5 stars + numeric rating --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginTop="8dp">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/star_1" android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_filled" android:layout_marginEnd="1dp" android:contentDescription="@null" /> <ImageView android:id="@+id/star_2" android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_filled" android:layout_marginEnd="1dp" android:contentDescription="@null" /> <ImageView android:id="@+id/star_3" android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_filled" android:layout_marginEnd="1dp" android:contentDescription="@null" /> <ImageView android:id="@+id/star_4" android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_filled" android:layout_marginEnd="1dp" android:contentDescription="@null" /> <ImageView android:id="@+id/star_5" android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_star_filled" android:contentDescription="@null" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_rating" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Row 4: Status badge + Category badge --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginTop="8dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_status" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="6dp" android:paddingEnd="6dp" android:paddingTop="2dp" android:paddingBottom="2dp" android:textSize="9sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textAllCaps="true" android:letterSpacing="0.06" android:visibility="gone" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_category" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingEnd="8dp" android:paddingTop="3dp" android:paddingBottom="3dp" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textAllCaps="true" android:letterSpacing="0.06" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:background="@drawable/bg_category_tag" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
